creator: rick@wzoeterwoude.net
text:
The following reply was made to PR ports/114317; it has been noted by GNATS.

From: Rick van der Zwet <rick@wzoeterwoude.net>
To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
Cc:  
Subject: Re: ports/114317: [repocopy] net/php5-rrdtool -> databases/php5-rrdtool
Date: Thu, 05 Jul 2007 09:23:04 +0200

 On 7/5/07 8:56 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
 > Maintainer of net/php5-rrdtool,
 > 
 > Please note that PR ports/114317 has just been submitted.
 > 
 > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
 > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
 > and a committer will take care of it.
 > 
 > The full text of the PR can be found at:
 >     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114317
 > 
 Edwin, go ahead. I trust your judgment :-)
 /Rick
